text: 3391 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "أَيُّ قَضِيَّةٍ أَعْدَلُ مِنَ اَلْقُرْعَةِ إِذَا فُوِّضَ اَلْأَمْرُ إِلَى اَللَّهِ أَ لَيْسَ اَللَّهُ تَعَالَى يَقُولُ: ۝ فَسٰاهَمَ فَكٰانَ مِنَ اَلْمُدْحَضِينَ ۝ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3391 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"What judgment is more just than the casting of lots (Qur'ah) when the matter is entrusted to Allah (swt)? Does not Allah (swt), the Exalted, say:
'So they cast lots, and he was among the losers'?" (Surah As-Saffat 37:141)
